action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "Hooks directory exists. Now I'll create the post-receive hook script that will deploy content from the main and dev branches to the appropriate directories served by Nginx.",
  "plan": "Create and configure the post-receive hook script with executable permissions.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /git/project.git/hooks/post-receive << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Deployment directories
MAIN_DEPLOY_DIR="/var/www/html"
DEV_DEPLOY_DIR="/var/www/html/dev"

# Create deployment directories if they don't exist
mkdir -p "$MAIN_DEPLOY_DIR"
mkdir -p "$DEV_DEPLOY_DIR"

# Read from stdin (ref updates)
while read oldrev newrev refname; do
  branch=$(git rev-parse --symbolic --abbrev-ref $refname)
  
  # Deploy main branch to root
  if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then
    echo "Deploying main branch..."
    git --git-dir=/git/project.git --work-tree="$MAIN_DEPLOY_DIR" checkout -f main
  fi
  
  # Deploy dev branch to /dev subdirectory
  if [ "$branch" = "dev" ]; then
    echo "Deploying dev branch..."
    git --git-dir=/git/project.git --work-tree="$DEV_DEPLOY_DIR" checkout -f dev
  fi
done
EOF
",
      "duration": 2.0
    }
  ]
}
